description: JS engine lifecycle hooks. Runtime-focused, boundary-aware with TS engine.

hooks.prompt:
DOMAIN: js-dev-skill
IF task involves: JavaScript runtime, Node.js, React components, Bun, Vite, event loop, or JS ecosystem tooling
THEN: Read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/SKILL.md for JS-specific guidance.
BOUNDARY: TypeScript type-system questions → typescript-coding-engine. This engine owns JS runtime patterns.
IF_SKIP: Risk mixing JS runtime and TS type-system concerns.

VERIFY: If JS code was written, did it follow modern ES2025+ patterns and the engine's runtime-first posture?
IF_NO: Check ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/references/ before completing.
